mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.selectList 설 명 : 다건 조회 */ SELECT RT.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM, RT.REG_DTTM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(RT.ASMT_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT ORDER BY RT.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM DESC, RT.REG_DTTM DESC

/* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.selectListPaging 설 명 : 페이징 */
SELECT RT.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(RT.ASMT_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT ORDER BY RT.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM DESC
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.insertAsmnt 설 명 : 과제 등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_ASMT ( ASMT_ID , SBJCT_ID , ASMT_GRP_ID , ASMT_TTL , ASMT_CTS , ASMT_GBNCD , DVCLAS_NO , LRN_GRP_ID , SBASMT_TYCD , EVL_SCR_TYCD , RUBLIC_ID , DELYN , SBMSN_FILE_MIME_TYCD , ASMT_PRCTCYN , DVCLAS_CNCRNT_REGYN , INDV_ASMTYN , TEAM_ASMT_STNGYN , TMBR_SBMSN_PRMYN , MRK_RFLTYN , MRK_RFLTRT , MRK_OYN , MRK_INQ_SDTTM , MRK_INQ_EDTTM , SBASMT_OSTD_OYN , SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_SDTTM , SBASMT_OSTD_OPEN_EDTTM , RESBMSN_SDTTM , RESBMSN_EDTTM , RESBMSN_MRK_RFLTRT , ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM , ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM , EXTD_SBMSN_PRMYN , EXTD_SBMSN_SDTTM , EXTD_SBMSN_EDTTM , EXLN_ASMT_DWLDYN , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{asmtId} , #{sbjctId} , #{asmtGrpId} , #{asmtTtl} , #{asmtCts} , #{asmtGbncd} , #{dvclasNo} , #{lrnGrpId} , #{sbasmtTycd} , #{evlScrTycd} , #{rublicId} , 'N' , #{sbmsnFileMimeTycd} , #{asmtPrctcyn} , #{dvclasCncrntRegyn} , #{indvAsmtyn} , #{teamAsmtStngyn} , NVL(#{tmbrSbmsnPrmyn}, 'Y') , #{mrkRfltyn} , 0 , #{mrkOyn} , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{mrkInqSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{mrkInqEdttm}) , #{sbasmtOstdOyn} , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{sbasmtOstdOpenSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{sbasmtOstdOpenEdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{resbmsnSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{resbmsnEdttm}) , NVL(#{resbmsnMrkRfltrt}, 0) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{asmtSbmsnSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{asmtSbmsnEdttm}) , #{extdSbmsnPrmyn} , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{extdSbmsnSdttm}) , FN_DTTM_FORMAT(#{extdSbmsnEdttm}) , NVL(#{exlnAsmtDwldyn}, 'N') , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.deleteAsmnt 설 명 : 과제 삭제 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_ASMT SET DELYN = 'Y' , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE ASMT_ID= #{asmtId}
/* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.deleteAsmntCreCrsRltn 설 명 : 개설과정과제 연결 삭제 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_ASMNT_CRE_CRS_RLTN SET DELYN = 'Y' WHERE ASMT_ID = #{asmtId}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.selectDeclsList 설 명 : 분반목록 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.DVCLAS_NO , A.PROF_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT B ON A.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = B.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND A.PROF_ID = B.PROF_ID WHERE B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}

/* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.selectPrevAsmntFiles 설 명 : 이전과제 */ SELECT A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.SBMSN_STSCD , A.RGTR_ID , A.SCR , B.ASMT_CTGRCD , B.SEND_TYPE , C.MDFR_ID AS FILE_RGTR_ID , C.MOD_DTTM AS FILE_REG_DTTM , ( SELECT ASMT_TTL FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID ) AS ASMT_TTL FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT B ON A.ASMT_ID = B.ASMT_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMNT_SBMT_FILE C ON A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = C.ASMT_SBMSN_ID WHERE A.ASMT_ID != #{asmtId} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.selectAsmntJoinUser 설 명 : 제출이력 */ SELECT A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.SBMSN_TYCD , A.TEAM_ID , A.SBMSN_CTS , A.SBMSN_TXT , A.SCR , A.SBMSN_STSCD , A.SBMSN_CNT , A.CNTN_IP , A.EVLYN , A.SCR_MEMO , A.DELYN , A.EXLN_ASMTYN , A.RESEND_YN , A.KONAN_MOSA_CMP_DTTM , A.KONAN_MAX_MOSART , A.KONAN_MAX_MOSA_ID , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A WHERE A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = #{asmtSbmsnId}

/* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.selectSubmitHystList 설 명 : 제출이력 목록 */ SELECT A.HSTRY_CD , A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , A.TEAM_ID , A.SBMSN_CTS , A.SBMT_FILE_INFO , A.CNTN_IP , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , B.SBMSN_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_ASMNT_JOIN_HSTY A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN B ON A.ASMT_ID = B.ASMT_ID AND A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID WHERE A.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.getScoreRatio 설 명 : 성적반영비율 리스트 */
SELECT ASMT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND ASMT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND ASMT_GBNCD NOT IN ('EXAM_SBST', 'ABSNCE_SBST', 'MID_EXAM_SBST_ASMT', 'LST_EXAM_SBST_ASMT')

/* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.selectMutEvalRslt 설 명 : 루브릭 평가 연결 조회 */ SELECT MTL_EVL_CD , ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , LINK_CD , STD_ID , EVL_DTTM , QSTN_ID , GRDCD , EVL_SCR , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT WHERE ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = #{asmtEvlId} AND LINK_CD = #{rltnCd} AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND QSTN_ID = #{qstnCd}

/* SQL ID : AsmntProDAO.listMutEvalRslt 설 명 : 루브릭 평가 연결 목록 조회 */ SELECT MTL_EVL_CD , ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID , LINK_CD , STD_ID , EVL_DTTM , QSTN_ID , GRDCD , EVL_SCR , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT WHERE ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = #{asmtEvlId} AND LINK_CD = #{rltnCd} AND STD_ID = #{stdNo}
